data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the verification timeline.
data.assessment: The step aimed to validate the verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or reads that confirm this requirement. There are no details or assertions related to the verification status of credentials, leading to an inability to assess whether the requirement is satisfied. Without concrete evidence or assertions related to this requirement, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked).
